title: Edge Generator Engine
summary: Generate candidate edges between concepts, structures, and domains so Akasha can propose new links instead of only reading existing ones.
why: The snapshot shows existing graph-oriented reasoning, but discovery becomes much stronger when Akasha can propose fresh edges and then pass them downstream for simulation, validation, and harvesting.
notes: Input examples: entropy ↔ improvisation, oscillation ↔ heartbeat, diffusion ↔ rumor spread.
Outputs should include candidate edge type, confidence, rationale, and provenance.
This is one of the clearest missing organs in the current constellation.
